rules.title: Adoption Expansion
rules.recommendation: Run a DevOps lifecycle expansion workshop to reach 3+ green use cases.
rules.issue_template:
# Adoption Expansion Motion

## Why now
{{why}}

## Recommended action
{{recommendation}}

## Execution checklist
- [ ] Confirm target use case and owner
- [ ] Schedule expansion workshop
- [ ] Capture post-workshop adoption delta

rules.title: Renewal Risk
rules.recommendation: Run Renewal Readiness Playbook and schedule executive alignment immediately.
rules.issue_template:
# Renewal Risk Stabilization

## Why now
{{why}}

## Recommended action
{{recommendation}}

## Execution checklist
- [ ] Confirm renewal risk owner
- [ ] Book executive alignment session
- [ ] Publish weekly readiness update

rules.title: Engagement Gap
rules.recommendation: Schedule a technical enablement workshop to re-establish cadence.
rules.why_template: Last customer interaction was {{days_since_last_touch}} days ago.
rules.issue_template:
# Engagement Cadence Recovery

## Why now
{{why}}

## Recommended action
{{recommendation}}

## Execution checklist
- [ ] Confirm workshop audience
- [ ] Set next touch date
- [ ] Log follow-up outcome

rules.title: Value Visibility
rules.recommendation: Prepare Executive Business Review with DevOps performance evidence.
rules.why_template: Adoption is high but value metrics are incomplete or missing.
rules.issue_template:
# Value Visibility Motion

## Why now
{{why}}

## Recommended action
{{recommendation}}

## Execution checklist
- [ ] Build EBR metric pack
- [ ] Validate business outcomes with sponsor
- [ ] Share customer-safe summary

rules.title: Executive Alignment
rules.recommendation: Schedule an executive checkpoint and align success metrics to renewal goals.
rules.why_template: Executive alignment is not confirmed and renewal is in {{renewal_days}} days.
rules.issue_template:
# Executive Alignment Motion

## Why now
{{why}}

## Recommended action
{{recommendation}}

## Execution checklist
- [ ] Confirm executive sponsor attendance
- [ ] Align metrics to renewal objective
- [ ] Capture executive decisions and owners
